title: Chromium
description: Quality of life improvements for HugoSMP.net
body:
## Chromium
Chromium is a lightweight client-side utility mod that gives you full control over what HugoSMP.net is allowed to display on your client.

Chromium lets you block intrusive server features such as forced resource packs, boss bars, scoreboards, and public chat messages — giving you a cleaner and less distracting gameplay experience. Since the development team wasn’t able to provide a “Disable Public Chat” option, this mod offers an alternative solution.

Chromium requires the following mods to access its in-game configuration:
- Cloth Config API
- Mod Menu

Disclaimer: This mod was made in half an hour, so there may be bugs.
https://github.com/andoraspalace/chromium/issues
